title: Seed Megatrend Configuration
description: Schema for validating seed-megatrends.yaml configuration. Seed megatrends are cross-industry canonical trends (Tier 1) that should be validated against discovered megatrends. Industry-specific trends (Tier 2) are captured separately for context enrichment.

seed_megatrends.description: Array of Tier 1 canonical megatrend definitions (cross-industry, 36+ months)

industry_trends.description: Optional array of Tier 2 industry-specific trends (NOT used for seeding, only for context enrichment)

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the seed configuration

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when seeds were generated

research_question.description: The research question these seeds were generated for

user_validated.description: Whether user has reviewed and validated the seed list

skip_megatrend_seeding.description: If true, user chose to skip megatrend seeding

name.description: Canonical megatrend name at cross-industry level (2-5 words)

tier.description: Abstraction level. Must be 1 for seed_megatrends (canonical cross-industry megatrend)

keywords.description: Search keywords for matching findings to this megatrend (cross-industry applicable)

canonical_sources.description: Independent futures research sources documenting this megatrend (Gartner, McKinsey, WEF, etc.)

cross_industry_validation.description: Examples of how this megatrend applies across different industries (minimum 3)

research_application.description: How this megatrend applies to the specific research context

dimension_affinity.description: Primary dimension this megatrend relates to (slug format)

validation_mode.description: How strictly to validate this seed against discovered megatrends

user_validated.description: Whether user has explicitly approved this seed

rationale.description: Brief explanation of why this is an expected megatrend (50-150 words)

planning_horizon_hint.description: Expected planning horizon for this megatrend

industryTrend.description: Tier 2 industry-specific trend (NOT used for seeding)

industry.description: Industry vertical this trend applies to

parent_megatrend.description: Name of the Tier 1 megatrend this is a manifestation of

rationale.description: How this industry trend relates to its parent megatrend
